/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PatrolDemo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PatrolDemo.dir/Patrol_Demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PatrolDemo.dir/src/mapCreation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PatrolDemo.dir/src/mapVisualizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PatrolDemo.dir/src/spawnConfig.cpp.o -o PatrolDemo  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgdal.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.3.0.2
